title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Smartworks - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Smartworks - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Smartworks, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Smartworks:
Smartworks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Smartworks!
